response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist with nearly two decades of software engineering experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI/GenAI experience only dates to 2025. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on major cloud platforms, and Python is notably absent from his skill list. His craftsmanship background and customer-facing workshop experience partially offset these gaps, but he falls well short of the core AI requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq
Deep full-stack engineering experience (~19 years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
Proven mentorship and technical-communication skills through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (AI work began ~2025)
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python is not listed among his skills, and no data-pipeline or ML infrastructure experience is shown

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python expertise
